instruction: User asked how to make git track all memory artifacts since AI is generating everything and the human user does none of the work.
input: User wanted git to track all memory/artifacts without differentiation because AI is doing all the work. Questioned whether manual differentiation was necessary.
output: Verified that git already tracks ALL AI-generated memory: data/*.jsonl (16 files), vector_store/*.json (47 files), iterations/*.json (31 files including 13 decisions), MEMORY.md, retrieval_log.jsonl. Only vault credentials and security logs are excluded. No changes needed - system already configured correctly.
